Precondition: Admin user is logged in and is on PIM > Add Employee page
Steps: 1. Enter First Name as 'Ava';2. Enter Last Name as 'Stone';3. Click Save

Scenario: Block save when required name is missing
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and is on PIM > Add Employee page
Steps: 1. Enter First Name as 'Ava';2. Leave Last Name blank;3. Click Save
Expected Result: Required field validation is shown for Last Name

Precondition: Admin user is logged in and is on PIM > Add Employee page with a valid image file available
Steps: 1. Click photo upload;2. Select a valid PNG or JPG file within allowed size;3. Click Save
Expected Result: Uploaded photo is accepted and employee save flow continues

Scenario: Reject invalid or oversized employee photo
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and is on PIM > Add Employee page with an invalid file available
Steps: 1. Click photo upload;2. Select unsupported format or file larger than allowed limit;3. Attempt to save
Expected Result: System rejects the upload and shows an upload validation error

Scenario: Auto-populate Employee Id when left blank
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and is on PIM > Add Employee page
Steps: 1. Enter valid First Name and Last Name;2. Clear Employee Id field;3. Click Save

Scenario: Reject duplicate manually entered Employee Id
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and a known existing Employee Id is available
Steps: 1. Enter valid First Name and Last Name;2. Enter an existing Employee Id manually;3. Click Save
Expected Result: System blocks save with duplicate Employee Id validation

Scenario: Allow same employee name with unique internal id
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and an employee with same name already exists
Steps: 1. Enter First Name and Last Name matching an existing employee;2. Keep a unique Employee Id;3. Click Save
Expected Result: Employee is created with a unique internal id

Scenario: Block creation when duplicate name uses existing Employee Id
Precondition: Admin user is logged in and existing employee name plus id are known
Steps: 1. Enter First Name and Last Name matching an existing employee;2. Enter that employee's existing Employee Id;3. Click Save
Expected Result: System blocks creation due to duplicate Employee Id
